summary: markable-table typosquat executes remote code from attacker-controlled Vercel host on install
details: markable-table is a typosquat of markdown-table. package.json declares scripts.preinstall = 'node index.js', so index.js runs automatically on npm install and again on any require/import of the package. index.js contains a base64 literal that decodes to an async IIFE which fetches https://everydaynodechecker-39143n.vercel.app/api/key?mem=root0 and passes the response body to eval. The eval identifier is reconstructed from the char-code array [101,118,97,108] and invoked via globalThis[tag](text) to evade static detection. The fetched content is unpinned, mutable, and served from a Vercel host controlled by the package publisher, allowing arbitrary code execution on the installer's machine at install time.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
